area: Midtown Raleigh / North Hills District, NC -- retail core
schema_note: Same local_xz coordinate system as buildings.json / roads.json / park.json. These are individually named storefronts within the 'north_hills_district' building cluster from buildings.json -- use these for ground-floor signage/labeling detail, and the parent cluster entry for overall massing.

shops.name: STIR
shops.notes: Ground floor of/adjacent to the Bank of America Tower block. Valet entrance -- consider a small porte-cochere/awning detail.

shops.name: Yard House
shops.notes: Large casual dining/bar frontage, big glass storefront.

shops.name: RH Rooftop Restaurant
shops.notes: Sits on top of the rh_raleigh_showroom building (see buildings.json) -- model as the rooftop level of that building, not a separate ground-floor box. Has outdoor seating with fire pits.

shops.name: Leo's Italian Social
shops.notes: Sits beneath a hotel block in real life -- model as a ground-floor tenant space.

shops.name: Sixty Vines
shops.notes: Has its own rooftop patio in addition to ground floor -- near One North Hills Tower.

shops.name: Barking Dog
shops.notes: Dog-friendly casual restaurant, near Park at N Hills St frontage.

shops.name: Retail Block A (generic storefronts)
shops.notes: Row of 4-6 small attached generic shopfronts -- use for filler variety, no specific real tenant mapped.

shops.name: Retail Block B (generic storefronts)
shops.notes: Single-story generic strip facing the park, slightly angled to the loop road.

shops.name: Anchor Retail/Department Store Block
shops.notes: Larger single retail volume (department-store scale) bordering Midtown Park.
